mapper.select: SELECT mm.*, u1.name as creator_name, u2.name as host_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_comments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_attachments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as attachment_count FROM meeting_minutes mm LEFT JOIN users u1 ON mm.creator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON mm.host_id = u2.id WHERE mm.id = #{id}

SELECT mm.*, u1.name as creator_name, u2.name as host_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_comments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_attachments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as attachment_count FROM meeting_minutes mm LEFT JOIN users u1 ON mm.creator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON mm.host_id = u2.id WHERE mm.creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY mm.created_time DESC

SELECT mm.*, u1.name as creator_name, u2.name as host_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_comments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_attachments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as attachment_count FROM meeting_minutes mm LEFT JOIN users u1 ON mm.creator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON mm.host_id = u2.id WHERE mm.status = #{status} ORDER BY mm.created_time DESC

SELECT mm.*, u1.name as creator_name, u2.name as host_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_comments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM minute_attachments WHERE minute_id = mm.id) as attachment_count FROM meeting_minutes mm LEFT JOIN users u1 ON mm.creator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON mm.host_id = u2.id ORDER BY mm.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meeting_minutes (id, title, meeting_date, meeting_time, location, host_id, status, current_version, summary, content, creator_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{meetingDate}, #{meetingTime}, #{location}, #{hostId}, #{status}, #{currentVersion}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE meeting_minutes SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
